creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mon, Jul 18, 2011 at 11:23:26AM -0600, Brad Huntting wrote:
> I looked over the patch and it seems quite reasonable.

Thanks!

> I wont have an opportunity to use fcron on freebsd anytime in the
> near future.  Would you like to take over maintaining the port?
> If not, I'll ask on freebsd-ports@

I think that it is better to ask at freebsd-ports@ first, since
I am not very much sure that I will use fcron widely, but may be
it will be useful for my notebook.
--
